landing.heroTitle: Xaalis buy dugg, xaalis buy génn — gis ko waxtu wu ne.
landing.heroSub: Moneytracer mooy jumtukaay bu kayit xaalis ak wàllu njëg ngir kompaañi yu ndaw, mbootaay yu denc xaalis, ak dëpansu boroom. Toppatoo jaay ak marchandiz, sàmm ndimbal sa mbootaay, walla sàmm sa bopp bujet — lépp ci benn tabloo bu yomb.
landing.trackCommunity: Maa ngi jiite mbootaay bu denc xaalis
landing.ctaCommunity: Aajal sama mbootaay bu denc xaalis
landing.businessFeaturesTitle: Lépp lu kompaañi bu ndaw soxla ngir toppatoo xaalisam
landing.businessFeaturesSub: Dale ci tabl ba ci bilaas, Moneytracer dafay sàmm sa jaay, marchandiz, ak jarigi xaalis ci yoon te du la wara jëfandikoo tabalo.
landing.communityFeaturesTitle: Defar ngir tontin yi, banque de table, ak mbootaay yu wër
landing.communityFeaturesSub: Bàyyi toppatoo ndimbal ci kayit. Moneytracer di jox sa mbootaay kayit bu dëggu te ñépp mën koo wóolu.
landing.personalFeaturesTitle: Jëfandikoo xaalis ci xam-xam, te du la wara tabalo
landing.personalFeaturesSub: Bind sa dëpans ci sekond, gis li war a jëfandikoo tey, te defar jëf yu gëna baax ak jamono — ci sa anam, muy bujet, jëf, walla denc ak say xarit.

businessFeatures.title: Barab Jaay
businessFeatures.text: Fey bu gaaw ngir marchandiz yu bare ak wóoral marchandiz ci saa si, defar ngir kaawtar.

businessFeatures.title: Marchandiz
businessFeatures.text: Toppatoo tolluwaayu marchandiz, dugal marchandiz ci mbootaay, te am yëgle bi dul mujj.

businessFeatures.title: Faktiir ak Devi
businessFeatures.text: Yónnee faktiir ak devi yu am solo, te soppi devi yu ñu nangu ci jaay.

businessFeatures.title: Ñi Am Dëkkeel Ak Ñi Ñu Dëkkeel
businessFeatures.text: Xam ku la war ak ku nga war, ci benn xool.

businessFeatures.title: Rapoor
businessFeatures.text: Njariñ ak perte, ndajem xaalis, ak njëgu marchandiz — bees la ba tey.

businessFeatures.title: Jarnal Liggéey
businessFeatures.text: Jaar-jaari mat bu ku def lan, ngir lu nekk du réer bu ñu ko xamul.

communityFeatures.title: Sàmm Ndaw Yi
communityFeatures.text: Yokk ndaw, tàyal ku bindaat, te jox ndaw yi sañ-sañu seen bopp ngir jàng rekk.

communityFeatures.title: Ndimbal
communityFeatures.text: Bind ndimbal denc gu ndaw gu nekk te gis limu mbootaay biy soppiku ci saa si.

communityFeatures.title: Xaalis Bu Génn
communityFeatures.text: Toppatoo xaalis bu wër walla partaas bu jub, ak jaar-jaari mat ndaw gu nekk.

communityFeatures.title: Njël Mbootaay
communityFeatures.text: Jox ndaw njël bu jóge ci denc mbootaay te toppatoo fey ba ci mujjug santim.

communityFeatures.title: Ndajem Mbootaay
communityFeatures.text: Benn xool bu leer ci limu denc, njël yu des, ak wérgi-yaramu mbootaay — ngir mbootaay bu nekk.

communityFeatures.title: Duggoo Ci Ronof Nekkin
communityFeatures.text: Kiy sàmm ak ku bindaat dañuy sàmm dugg yi; ndaw yi mën nañu gis seen kayit ci jamono yépp.

personalFeatures.title: Bindaal Dëpans Bu Gaaw
personalFeatures.text: Yokk dëpans ci sekond — limu xaalis, kategori, matna. Amul tabalo, amul jafe-jafe.

personalFeatures.title: Bujet Envelope
personalFeatures.text: Aajal bujet buy weer ci kategori bu nekk te xam waxtu wu ne li war a jëfandikoo tey.

personalFeatures.title: Jëfu Dëpans
personalFeatures.text: Marké dëpans ni war walla mbëggeel ci saa si te seetlu ni say jëf di gëna baax ci ayubés.

personalFeatures.title: Jubluwaayu Denc
personalFeatures.text: Aajal jubluwaay, toppatoo lu jëm kanam, te sax ci coobare ak dénd bu leer.

personalFeatures.title: Ndaje Mbootaay
personalFeatures.text: Denc ak say xarit ngir jubluwaay bu ñu bokk, te gis lu jëm kanam ku nekk.

personalFeatures.title: Xam-xamu Boroom
personalFeatures.text: Gis fu sa xaalis di jëm ci dëgg-dëgg, ak ayubés walla kategori yuy yokku.

landing.oneAccountTitle: Benn kont, ci anam bu la soxla
landing.oneAccountSub: Tànn kont bu kompaañi, mbootaay, walla boroom bo bind sa bopp — tabloo, ronof, ak rapoor dinañu wéyal.
landing.accountBusinessText: POS, marchandiz, faktiir, ak rapoor ngir bitig, jaaykat, ak kompaañi servis bu nekk ci limam.
landing.accountCommunityText: Ndimbal, xaalis bu génn, ak njël mbootaay ngir mbootaay yu denc xaalis ak mbootaay xaalis ci gox.
landing.accountPersonalText: Bujet, jëf, ak jubluwaayu denc ngir képp ku bëgga jëfandikoo xaalis ci xam-xam, boppam walla ak xarit.
landing.aboutTitle: Defar ci anam bu xaalis di jëm ci dëgg-dëgg
landing.aboutP1: Moneytracer tambalee na ci am xalaat bu yomb: jumtukaay yiy dimbali boroom bitig, tresorye mbootaay bu denc xaalis, walla képp ku bujetal peyam warul soxla diplom ci konteb walla tabalo. Muy sa bitig bu jumtukaay, sàmm ndimbalu weer bu tontin, walla nga di seet fu sa xaalis di jëm, Moneytracer di la jox benn kayit bu leer, bu dëggu ngay wóolu.
landing.aboutP2: Defar nanu ko jëkk ngir kompaañi ak mbootaay yi nekk ci Afrik — ak ndimbal ci xeetu xaalis yu bare ci diggante kontinaa bi, jëf yuy jaar te internet du fi solo, ak njëg yu yem ngir kompaañi bu ndaw, du ngir gropoo bu adduna. Amul wax yu jafe, amul melokaan yu doo jëfandikoo — limu xaalis yu am solo rekk, bees ba tey.
landing.statDashboard: Tabloo ngir lépp lu nga toppatoo
landing.valueSimpleText: Soxlaguñu jàngale. Su nga mëna jëfandikoo telefon, mën nga sàmm say kayit ci Moneytracer dale ci bes bu jëkk.
landing.valueDataText: Kont bu nekk tekkiku na te tegu na, ak jarnal liggéey bu mat ngir nga xam waxtu wu ne ku soppi lan.
landing.valueAfricaText: Xaalis yu gox, jamono yu gox — defar ci ni kompaañi ak mbootaay yi fi nekk di jëfandikoo ci dëgg-dëgg.
landing.pricingTitle: Ndax nga waaj a aajal say xaalis?
landing.pricingSub: Sos kont ci ay simili. Soxlaguloo tabalo.
landing.betaNoticeP1: Moneytracer amul njëg ngir bés yu jëkk yi
landing.betaNoticeP2: bi ñuy defaru ko lool. Ci diggante jamono jii, mën nga gis soppeeku bés bu nekk, jumte yu bare, walla tëj bu gàtt bi ñuy indi njeexital. Dinanu yégle politig njëg lu jiitu ba jamono beta bi mujj.
landing.disclaimerText: Moneytracer mu ngi ci defaru lool (beta) tey. Jëfandikoo Servis bi war na Yoonu Jëfandikoo ak Yëgle bu mat ci sunu bopp, buy dañal ñàkk done, dayo waadu, sàmm, ak jubal xuloo. Jàngal yoon yu mat yi bala ngay wóolu Servis bi ngir kayit xaalis kompaañi, mbootaay, walla boroom.
landing.readFullTerms: Jàngal Yoonu Jëfandikoo ak Yëgle Bu Mat →
landing.availableInLanguages: Am na ci làkk yu bare, ci lu bokk Wolof.
